docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ORTIZ, IVAN AS TO DEFENDANT MCMULLIAN, STUART JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, IVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMULLIAN, STUART JASON $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO STUART JASON MCMULLIAN RETURNED, NO SUCH NUMBER;
